name: memory-lint
description: PostToolUse(Write|Edit) advisory for the auto-memory index file (`memory/MEMORY.md`). Fires when tool_input.file_path ends in `memory/MEMORY.md` and reads the post-write file to emit non-blocking additionalContext for: entry count > 30 (hot-tier soft cap → migrate older items to sibling MEMORY.archive.md), any non-comment line > 150 chars (TLDR refactor budget — verb + nouns, push trailing clauses into the sibling `*.md` file). Implemented in hexa-lang (`_memory_lint.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Keeps the always-loaded MEMORY.md dense + greppable as memories accumulate. Advisory-only by design (per the guards-narrow-scope policy: non-blocking additionalContext > deny for hygiene).
